method: ADR 0009 D5 — record the Linux CI baseline FIRST; ceilings are baseline p95 plus fixed headroom, set once per roadmap cycle, never ratcheted per item. Scenarios without maxP95Ms are in RECORDING mode: the bench reports them and cannot fail on them.

runner.measurement: fresh child processes; wall time of the complete spawn (node startup + TypeScript load + validate); non-zero child exits abort the run

hook.rationale: The per-keystroke interactive path: ark-mcp --hook validates the single proposed file (no scan-cache involvement — one distribution). Linux baseline p95 635.14 ms recorded by CI run 29528935846 (2026-07-16); ceiling = baseline + ~26% runner headroom, set once for this cycle (D5 — never ratcheted per item).

doctorCold.rationale: Cold one-shot doctor over the tree. Linux baseline p95 4063.72 ms recorded by CI run 29528935846 (2026-07-16); ceiling = baseline + ~25% runner headroom, set once for this cycle.
